final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3x3 character expression grid for Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) from Chinese Paladin (仙剑奇侠传), intended for fan art sharing and character design reference.

Style/medium: 3D animation with the soft sculptural warmth and expressive character design sensibility of Pixar, honoring Zhao Ling'er's ethereal spirit maiden aesthetic
Composition: 3x3 grid layout with nine equal panels, each panel featuring Zhao Ling'er peeking through a torn hole in white paper as the unifying framing device
Subject: Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) — young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses, maintaining her gentle yet spirited essence across nine expressions
  top-left: winking expression, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  top-center: smirking expression, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  top-right: thinking expression, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  middle-left: big smile, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
  middle-center: smiling expression, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  middle-right: neutral expression, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  bottom-left: happy expression, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  bottom-right: silly expression, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: clean white paper background with nine torn circular holes, each hole framing one of Zhao Ling'er's expressions in a cohesive grid
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting that sculpts the 3D forms gently, playful and approachable character study atmosphere
Color palette: each panel distinguished by its outfit color (green, red, yellow, black/white, orange, blue, purple, pink, teal) against the neutral white paper ground
Materials/textures: smooth 3D rendered surfaces with subtle fabric texture on clothing, clean paper edges with soft torn texture around each hole
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: nine panels in strict 3x3 grid, consistent character likeness of Zhao Ling'er across all panels, torn paper framing device identical in each panel, outfit colors must match specified palette
Avoid: harsh shadows, photorealistic rendering, inconsistent character proportions between panels, busy backgrounds that compete with the character expressions
